case_title: TERRENCE JONES VS. CHRISTINE LOUISE GARCIA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL FILED BY JONES, TERRENCE GARCIA, CHRISTINE LOUISE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, TERRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, CHRISTINE LOUISE $560.12 PRINCIPAL, $16.33 INTEREST, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $671.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CHRISTINE LOUISE
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE FILED. UNABLE TO SERVE DEFT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED JUL-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CHRISTINE LOUISE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,270.24 FILED BY JONES, TERRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CHRISTINE LOUISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-20-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
